title: Diagnose a reverted or stuck transaction
description: Trace a failing transaction to its revert reason or gas/nonce cause instead of resubmitting blindly.
body: Steps: 1. Get the transaction hash and read its status and revert reason. 2. Distinguish causes: a require/revert (logic), out-of-gas (limit too low or unbounded work), or a nonce/replacement issue (stuck pending tx). 3. For reverts, trace the call to the failing require and check inputs/state. 4. For out-of-gas, estimate gas for the worst case and check for unbounded loops. 5. For nonce issues, inspect the account's pending transactions. Rollback point: before resubmitting a value-moving transaction. Validation: the root cause is identified and a re-run with the fix succeeds; blindly bumping gas or resubmitting without the revert reason risks repeating or duplicating the failure.
